# PointCast

> A living broadcast at the intersection of art, music, on-chain tokens,
> and human–AI collaboration. Built by Mike Hoydich with Claude (Anthropic)
> from El Segundo, California. Public, CC0-flavored, welcomes crawlers
> and citation.

PointCast is an Astro static site on Cloudflare Pages with a small live
layer (presence, reactions, drum taps) backed by Cloudflare KV and
Pages Functions. It is a real website, not a demo — the homepage is
the living room; the sub-routes are rooms in that room.

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://pointcast.xyz/) — masthead + drum module hero,
  live presence + reactions, Noun Bells instrument, weather from
  El Segundo, Spotify currently-spinning, featured Tezos listing,
  feedback block, footer.
- [Drum Room](https://pointcast.xyz/drum) — multiplayer cookie-clicker
  rhythm game. 5-drum rack (low/mid/high/bell/shaker) with unlocks,
  combo multipliers, live BPM, cross-client real-time sound broadcast,
  global + leaderboard counters. Earns DRUM token on Tezos (ships Phase C).
- [Collect](https://pointcast.xyz/collect) — Mike's Tezos tokens, free
  mints via connected Kukai wallet using Taquito + Beacon. Individual
  token pages at `/collect/<tokenId>`.
- [About](https://pointcast.xyz/about) — Mike Hoydich profile.
- [Admin / Deploy](https://pointcast.xyz/admin/deploy) — browser-based
  FA2 contract originator (owner-only, unindexed).

## Key concepts

- **Visit Nouns** — CC0 pixel avatars from [nouns.wtf](https://nouns.wtf)
  served via [noun.pics](https://noun.pics). Every visitor to PointCast
  picks one on arrival; future FA2 contract will mint them as collectible
  NFTs on Tezos.
- **Chime system** — deterministic Web Audio synth; each Noun ID hashes
  to a unique voice (note + waveform + decay + chord) within a Yō
  pentatonic scale. Source: `src/lib/chimes.ts`.
- **Presence** — server-tracked visitors via Cloudflare edge geo + KV,
  humans/AI/bots classified by User-Agent. Served at `/api/visit`.
- **Reactions** — slackmoji-style (👋 ❤️ 👀 🔥 ✨ 🎉 🫡 🤝) applied per
  visitor; shared across room via `/api/reactions`.
- **Drum tokens (DRUM)** — FA1.2 fungible on Tezos, claimed from the
  drum room via server-signed vouchers. Contract in
  `contracts/drum_token.py` (written, not yet deployed).
- **Mint the moment** — each weather snapshot (temp, location,
  timestamp) can be attached as metadata to a minted Visit Noun.

## Contracts (Tezos)

All SmartPy, TZIP-12 / TZIP-16 / TZIP-21 compliant. Source in
`contracts/`:

- **visit_nouns_fa2.py** — FA2 multi-asset, public `mint_noun(nounId)`,
  20% royalty, deterministic IPFS metadata URIs.
- **marketplace.py** — own marketplace; list/fulfill/cancel/update ask
  with per-token royalty handling + 2% platform fee (adjustable).
- **drum_token.py** — FA1.2 for DRUM; signed-voucher claim flow with
  replay protection.

## License + reuse

Code: MIT-flavored (check repo). Art via noun.pics is CC0. Citations
welcome; a link back to pointcast.xyz is appreciated but not required.
Don't republish full copies of the living site — scrape, cite, link.
